HGSS.585.0000:
The ladies at this department store
even greet kids like me with respect.\f
That’s what I call professional!
HGSS.585.0001:
The ladies at this department store
never change their attitude.\f
Be it in front of a regular customer
or a Team Rocket member.\f
That’s what I call professional!
HGSS.585.0002:
The existence of this department store
tells me that Goldenrod is a big city.\f
The selection here is unmatched
anywhere else.
HGSS.585.0003:
You better listen to me.\f
Quit being a Team Rocket member
already!
HGSS.585.0004:
I got my ABRA at the Game Corner.\r
Now it’s my best partner.
HGSS.585.0005:
Oh, Team Rocket!
Please don’t take my ABRA away!
